QW-150  TESTS. (a) Tests for qualification of welding procedures and performance shall be as required by QW-160. (b) Mechanical tests shall include tension and guided bend tests, unless exempted by QW-190 for alternative examinations. (c) Specimens shall be prepared from coupons welded in accordance with QW-200, subject to the conditions of QW-300 for performance qualification. Specimen types shall comply with QW-452. For the specific tests required for each joint type, refer to QW-160.
